title: Xtra Light Indian Chicken Butter Chicken
description: A light and salty Indian dish featuring dasima-kombu and miso-marinate, perfect for a satvik-friendly meal.
instructions: Soak the dasima-kombu in water for 30 minutes, then cut it into small pieces.
In a blender, blend the miso paste, yogurt, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt to make the marinade.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well, then refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the ghee in a large skillet over medium heat, then add the cumin powder and coriander powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 6-8 minutes.
Add the tomato puree, dasima-kombu, and black pepper to the skillet, then stir well to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season the mixture with salt to taste, then serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
